dashboard.label: AgentScope — Agent Telemetry
dashboard.description: Every AI agent tool call observable in Splunk. Drop-in @instrument decorator for Claude Code / Cursor / Codex. Schema: ToolCallEvent (sourcetype agentscope:toolcall, index agentscope).

search.query: index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-15m@m | sort - started_at_ms | eval ts=strftime(started_at_ms/1000, "%H:%M:%S.%3N") | table ts, agent, tool, status, duration_ms, cost_usd | rename ts as Time, agent as Agent, tool as Tool, status as Status, duration_ms as "Duration (ms)", cost_usd as "Cost (USD)" | head 50

panel.title: Tool Call Volume by Service — last 24h

search.query: index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-24h | bin _time span=15m | stats count by _time, agent | xyseries _time agent count
index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-24h | stats count by status | sort - count

panel.title: Token Cost Waterfall — by Agent (last 24h, USD)

search.query: index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-24h cost_usd=* | stats sum(cost_usd) as cost by agent | sort - cost | head 10
index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-24h cost_usd=* | stats sum(cost_usd) as cost | eval cost=round(cost, 2)

panel.title: High-Risk Anomaly Spike — keywords like rm -rf, DROP TABLE, sudo

search.query: index=agentscope sourcetype=agentscope:toolcall earliest=-1h ("rm -rf" OR "DROP TABLE" OR "sudo " OR "force-push") | sort - started_at_ms | eval ts=strftime(started_at_ms/1000, "%H:%M:%S") | table ts, agent, tool, args_summary, status | rename ts as Time, agent as Agent, tool as Tool, args_summary as "Args (redacted)", status as Status | head 25
